---
name: Feature request
description: Propose a product capability or UX improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Outcome

What user or business outcome should this enable?

## Scope

What is included?

## Out Of Scope

What should not be changed?

## User Flow

How should the user experience work?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Behavior is implemented.
- [ ] UI works in light and dark themes where applicable.
- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior.
- [ ] Relevant docs are updated if needed.
